# easytry

> A modern, lightweight, zero-dependency utility toolkit for everyday JavaScript/TypeScript development.

easytry provides 110+ utility functions across 11 modules. It is tree-shakeable, ships ESM + CJS dual output, and includes full TypeScript type definitions.

## Installation

```bash
npm install easytry
```

## Import Patterns

```ts
// Import from main entry (all utilities)
import { slugify, chunk, uuid, retry } from 'easytry';

// Import from specific module (tree-shakeable, recommended)
import { slugify, camelCase } from 'easytry/string';
import { chunk, groupBy } from 'easytry/array';
import { uuid, nanoid } from 'easytry/id';
import { pick, deepClone } from 'easytry/object';
import { clamp, formatBytes } from 'easytry/number';
import { timeAgo, formatDate } from 'easytry/date';
import { isEmail, isEmpty } from 'easytry/validate';
import { retry, sleep } from 'easytry/async';
import { hexToRgb, lighten } from 'easytry/color';
import { ms, memoize } from 'easytry/misc';

// CommonJS
const { slugify, chunk } = require('easytry');
```

## Modules

- `easytry/string` — String manipulation: slugify, case conversion, truncate, mask, template, escape
- `easytry/id` — ID generation: uuid, nanoid, shortId, prefixedId, sequential Incrementer
- `easytry/object` — Object helpers: pick, omit, deepClone, deepMerge, flatten, get/set by path
- `easytry/array` — Array helpers: chunk, unique, groupBy, sortBy, partition, range, zip, compact
- `easytry/number` — Number helpers: clamp, format, ordinal, humanReadable, lerp, formatBytes
- `easytry/date` — Date helpers: timeAgo, formatDate, daysBetween, addDays, isToday
- `easytry/validate` — Validators: isEmail, isURL, isEmpty, isEqual, isUUID, isJSON, isCreditCard
- `easytry/async` — Async helpers: retry with backoff, sleep, debounce, throttle, pMap, timeout, mutex
- `easytry/color` — Color helpers: hex/rgb/hsl conversion, lighten, darken, contrast, textColor
- `easytry/misc` — Misc: ms parser, memoize, once, pipe, deepFreeze, safeJsonParse, env readers

## Detailed Documentation

For the full API reference with every function signature, see [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/iam-hussain/easy-try-npm/blob/master/llms-full.txt).
